name: Ubiquiti UISP Box
title: Ubiquiti UISP Box
short_description: A compact, weatherproof enclosure for UISP® Routers and Switches.
description: The Ubiquiti UISP Box, identified by the manufacturer part number UISP-Box, is a highly robust and adaptable enclosure designed to securely house and protect critical networking equipment in challenging outdoor or industrial environments. This enclosure is especially suitable for Ubiquiti’s or UISP® Routers and Switches, ensuring that they remain operational under extreme conditions.

detailed_description.heading: Robust Outdoor Enclosure
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UISP Box, identified by the manufacturer part number UISP-Box, is a highly robust and adaptable enclosure designed to securely house and protect critical networking equipment in challenging outdoor or industrial environments. This enclosure is especially suitable for Ubiquiti’s or UISP® Routers and Switches, ensuring that they remain operational under extreme conditions.

detailed_description.heading: Important Note for Operation
detailed_description.text: Designed to house and protect the UISP-R and UISP-S models. Also, keep in mind, that UISP Power TransPort™ Cable required for operation (sold separately).

detailed_description.heading: Durable Construction and Weather Protection
detailed_description.text: The UISP Box is constructed from UV-stabilized polycarbonate, a material known for its strength, durability, and resistance to ultraviolet rays. This ensures long-term reliability without degradation due to sunlight exposure. Rated IP67, the enclosure offers complete protection against dust ingress and waterproof. Engineered to endure wind speeds of up to 200 km/hr (124.27 mph), the UISP Box is suitable for high-altitude or exposed locations where strong winds are a regular occurrence, ensuring stability and ongoing operation during severe weather conditions. The UISP Box supports a versatile mounting system that accommodates pole diameters from 35 to 60 mm (1.38 to 2.36 inches), facilitating easy and secure installation on a variety of pole sizes.
